name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Check Into Cash is located at 542 S Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80910 in the Southeast Colorado Springs neighborhood. Business status: CLOSED_PERMANENTLY. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.6 stars across 90 reviews. Call +1 719-550-3290.
description_long:
Check Into Cash is an established emergency lending provider that has operated for 30 years, serving customers seeking short-term financial solutions. The company operates a network of physical retail locations, including their Ferndale, Michigan branch at 749 East 9 Mile Road, alongside online lending options. Their primary focus is delivering fast access to cash for unexpected expenses through multiple loan products designed for rapid deployment.

The company offers payday loans up to $600 available in-store and online, installment loans with longer terms and lower payments, title loans secured by vehicle ownership, and a Flex Line of Credit for repeated borrowing. Beyond lending, Check Into Cash provides ancillary financial services including check cashing, bill pay, Western Union money transfers, Green Dot Visa debit cards, and tax preparation services. Their application process requires a government-issued ID, proof of active checking account, Social Security number, and proof of income.

Check Into Cash distinguishes itself through its established 30-year operational history, multi-location retail presence enabling same-day cash access, and bundled financial services beyond lending. The Ferndale location operates extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 8am-7pm Friday, 9am-4pm Saturday) and maintains a transparent fee structure available on their website. Their emphasis on quick, easy, and confidential service targets customers with immediate cash needs who value in-person interactions and guaranteed same-day funding.

The company operates within the high-cost short-term lending space, meaning customers should expect substantial interest rates and fees typical of payday products. While their extended operating history and physical presence provide legitimacy and accessibility, the regulatory disclaimer that "not all consumers will qualify" and variation in "loan amounts and eligibility based on ability to repay" indicates underwriting scrutiny. Customers should review their state-specific rates and fee schedules before applying, as terms vary significantly by jurisdiction.
address: 542 S Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80910

company_info.headquarters: 542 S Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80910

pros: Same-day cash funding available in-store with just a checking account, ID, and proof of income
30 years of operational history providing established brand stability in emergency lending
Multiple loan products (payday, installment, title, flex credit line) allowing customers to choose based on needs
Extended retail hours including Saturday morning access (Ferndale location: 9am-7pm weekdays, 8am-4pm Saturday)
Bundle of complementary financial services including check cashing, bill pay, and Western Union transfers
Transparent fee and rate disclosure with state-specific Retail Fee Schedule publicly available
Online application option available alongside in-store convenience
cons: Payday loan products carry high interest rates and fees typical of short-term lending, making them expensive borrowing
Loan amounts capped at $600 for payday products, insufficient for larger emergency expenses
Underwriting restrictions mean 'not all consumers will qualify,' with eligibility based on ability-to-repay assessments
Requires active checking account, which excludes unbanked consumers despite offering financial services
No mention of financial counseling or debt management education to help customers avoid repeat borrowing cycles
best_for: Employed individuals with checking accounts facing small unexpected expenses needing same-day cash
Customers who prefer in-person interactions and immediate funding over online-only lenders
Vehicle owners considering title loans as collateral-secured alternative to payday products
Customers bundling multiple services like check cashing and bill pay at one location
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is best for employed, banked consumers facing urgent cash needs under $600 who value same-day in-person service and can afford high-cost borrowing. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans carry substantial interest rates and fees; customers should only use this as a true emergency solution and explore alternatives like credit union PALs or employer advances before applying.
services: Installment loans with extended repayment terms
Title loans secured by vehicle ownership
Flex Line of Credit for revolving credit access
Green Dot Visa debit card accounts
